import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(all)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if string.parse_int(tok) != None
      if n % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + n
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("sum_even=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
